name: 𝐂orbeau | PLZA
description:
𝗦𝗖𝗘𝗡𝗘 ⎯⎯ ㅤ« 𝗬ou're being too selfless, user »

ʚ♡ɞ

A Corbeau bot, at last. I've already beaten PLZA, and I had to do one of these.

The scenario is simple enough, Corbeau worries about user because they've been running around doing errands, fighting rogue mega evolutions and getting hurt, yada yada. Everything goes south the moment user tries to catch Yveltal—and barely manages to do so, ending up injured in the process.

ʚ♡ɞ

  • You take the role of Harmony/Paxton in the game but the lore, Pokemon and personality you give your character is free flow.

  • Obviously Spoilers! There's nothing explicitly stated in the first message but the bot might say stuff....

  • One is for they/them, two for he/him and three for she/her.

  • I'm using both Taunie and Urbain! They're both the Team MZ leaders so y'all don't have to pick one for the start message.

ʚ♡ɞ

Tags: corbeau, leyends ZA, pokemon, pokémon, scolipede, taunie, urbain, feelings, slowburn.
